title: Live Speech Transcription
summary: Simulate a class recording upload and reveal the transcript only when the participant presses the upload button.
uploadNote: No real recording is needed here. This button is just a stand-in for passing in a classroom audio file.
examplesCaption: Use the sample classroom recording below to simulate an upload.
outputCaption: The transcript appears on the right only after the sample recording is uploaded.

exampleInputs.label: Class recording
exampleInputs.outputText:
Teacher: Today we are talking about how plants make their own food.

Student 1: Is that what photosynthesis means?

Teacher: Exactly. Photosynthesis is the process plants use to turn sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide into glucose.

Student 2: Where does the oxygen come from?

Teacher: It is released as part of the process, which is one reason plants are so important.

Student 3: So sunlight is basically the energy source?

Teacher: Yes. Sunlight powers the reaction and helps the plant produce energy-rich sugars.
